M-036.NAME: mobile-user-cabinet
M-036.path: frontend scripts/phase45-trial-subscription-ux-smoke.mjs scripts/phase46-user-cabinet-ux-smoke.mjs scripts/phase53-user-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs scripts/phase68-dashboard-subscription-smoke.mjs scripts/phase69-referral-bonus-smoke.mjs scripts/phase70-config-qr-parity-smoke.mjs scripts/phase71-device-config-master-detail-smoke.mjs scripts/phase72-user-auth-navigation-smoke.mjs scripts/phase73-config-amnezia-qr-smoke.mjs docs/plans/Phase-23.xml docs/plans/Phase-45.xml docs/plans/Phase-46.xml docs/plans/Phase-53.xml docs/plans/Phase-68.xml docs/plans/Phase-69.xml docs/plans/Phase-70.xml docs/plans/Phase-71.xml docs/plans/Phase-72.xml docs/plans/Phase-73.xml
M-036.owns: Compact mobile-first personal cabinet for VPN status, subscription state, trial countdown/calendar, device management, and config access

exports.view-mobile-home: Single compact home surface with VPN status, subscription state, and primary config action
exports.view-mobile-config: Selected-device config workflow with QR, .conf download, copy, and device controls without visible raw-config diagnostics bloat
exports.view-mobile-devices: Small-screen device list with create, rotate, revoke, and selected-device config actions
exports.view-mobile-billing: Compact subscription and payment action surface
exports.view-mobile-countdown-calendar: Compact Phase-45 pending-first-VPN state, remaining days/hours/minutes, and active subscription date calendar
exports.view-mobile-empty-states: Phone-safe unavailable, expired, loading, and error states with actionable next steps

workflows.DF-UI-USER-HOME: Dashboard aggregates auth/user stats, VPN stats, subscription state, and device summary into the first mobile screen.
workflows.DF-UI-CONFIG-ACTION: Primary config action opens QR/download/copy for the current or newly created device without requiring a desktop layout.
workflows.DF-UI-DEVICE-MANAGEMENT: Device create, rotate, revoke, and config retrieval remain available through compact rows and confirmation-safe controls.
workflows.DF-UI-BILLING: Subscription page and dashboard renewal CTA preserve the existing billing API contract and payment redirect behavior while rendering Phase-45 pending/countdown/calendar state.
workflows.DF-UI-MTPROTO-PROXY: Dashboard shows the authenticated owner's Telegram MTProto proxy state and copy/open actions without hiding VPN trial or config actions.
workflows.DF-UI-MTPROTO-DUAL-LINKS: Dashboard exposes Telegram app tg:// and browser https://t.me proxy links through compact owner-only actions.

content-priority.primary: VPN status, config action, QR/download, subscription state, trial countdown/calendar, device slots, active device rows
content-priority.secondary: Telegram MTProto proxy state, traffic counters, last handshake, referral CTA, profile/settings shortcuts, raw config text
content-priority.removable-from-first-screen: Decorative hero copy, repeated identity panels, large status card grids, explanatory marketing text

constraints.constraint-1: Primary VPN config and subscription actions must be reachable within one or two taps on a phone.
constraints.constraint-2: Avoid wide tables, nested cards, decorative hero blocks, and horizontal scrolling.
constraints.constraint-3: Keep existing backend API contracts unless a separate contract change is approved.
constraints.constraint-4: Do not change deploy, install, Docker, nginx, or remote-server automation surfaces in this phase.
constraints.constraint-5: Do not mix session token storage hardening into this phase; that is owned by M-039 and Phase-25.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: 360x740, 390x844, and 430x932 viewports render without horizontal document scroll.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Config QR/download/copy path is reachable from the mobile home within one or two taps.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Device create, rotate, revoke, and selected config retrieval remain present after simplification.
acceptance-metrics.metric-4: cd frontend && npm run build passes.
acceptance-metrics.metric-5: Phase-31 MTProto card renders without horizontal scroll and keeps VPN config/subscription actions reachable.
acceptance-metrics.metric-6: Phase-45 subscription UX smoke passes for pending trial copy, server-derived countdown fields, active-date calendar marker, and stale 3-day copy guard.
acceptance-metrics.metric-7: Phase-46 UX smoke passes for password example, MTProto dual links, Russian labels, and bounded status refresh.
acceptance-metrics.metric-8: Phase-53 smoke and screenshot review pass for compact Matrix dashboard/config/subscription/referrals/settings routes without protected deploy/install changes.

phase-69-scope.primary-behaviors: Mobile-safe masked referral history rows and truthful pending referral-bonus subscription copy.

phase-70-scope.primary-behaviors: Phone-safe config page keeps QR/download/copy/device controls while QR rendering is visually lighter and payload-identical.

phase-71-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Phone and tablet config route must present a compact device list, selected-device detail, sticky QR/.conf/Copy actions, and separated destructive actions without horizontal scroll or bottom-nav overlap.
phase-71-executed-scope.acceptance: Users with 9 devices can select any device and export config on 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, and tablet viewports without wide tables or long uncontrolled action rows.

M-036.evidence: 2026-06-01: frontend npm run build passed, node scripts/phase45-trial-subscription-ux-smoke.mjs passed, and node scripts/phase46-user-cabinet-ux-smoke.mjs passed for password guidance and compact MTProto link/status UX. 2026-06-03: frontend npm run build and node scripts/phase53-user-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs passed; production-preview auth screenshots confirmed readable Matrix mobile surfaces while protected route coverage is static due local auth redirect. 2026-06-04: Phase-68 frontend build and smokes passed for MTProto-first dashboard, shared SubscriptionPanel, compact tariff/calendar view, and removed visible config raw/diagnostics panels. 2026-06-04: Phase-69 frontend build and smoke passed for masked referral rows and access_label-aware pending bonus copy. 2026-06-04: Phase-70 frontend build and Phase-70/57/62 smokes passed for lighter QR and compact config workflow preservation.
M-036.hotspot: H-023: Mobile user cabinet must keep config download, QR, subscription and device actions reachable without clutter
M-036.phase-71-evidence: Frontend build and Phase-71 smoke passed for mobile-safe master-detail device UX, sticky export actions, no raw diagnostics return, and compact user-cabinet copy/i18n cleanup.

phase-72-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Keep Главная, Конфигурация, Подписка, Рефералы, and Настройки reachable in a compact bottom dock with safe-area padding and no content overlap while desktop logout remains directly under Settings.
phase-72-executed-scope.acceptance: Phase-72 and Phase-61 smokes passed for bottom navigation markers, safe-area padding, touch target policy, and protected-surface guard.

M-036.phase-72-evidence: Frontend build, frontend-admin build prerequisite, Phase-72 smoke, and Phase-61 responsive smoke passed for mobile dock reachability and desktop logout ordering.

phase-73-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Mobile config route now shows KPN copy, keeps AmneziaWG QR/.conf/Copy reachable, removes unsupported AmneziaVPN QR advertising, and shows tariff-aware device-limit copy without changing API shapes.
phase-73-executed-scope.acceptance: Phone/tablet config workflows preserve selected-device actions and bottom-dock safety while AmneziaVPN users are directed to .conf import.

M-036.phase-73-evidence: Phase-73 smoke, Phase-71 regression smoke, and Phase-70 QR parity smoke passed locally for mobile config correctness and protected backend/deploy/runtime isolation.
